_doc: Authoritative status value domains and the mapping between the three status layers. The engine reads this; logic references these values, none are hardcoded.

status_original.note: 2-value simplification of secondary for business: Reopened->Opened; Closed after Reopened & Declined->Closed.

status_derived.note: Sits on top of Original; additionally forces open-but-0-reserve claims to Closed.

declined.note: Rolls up to 'closed'; only visible in secondary status.
